name: Steel-Toe Safety Shoes
shortDescription: Low-ankle safety shoe with steel toe cap and oil-resistant sole.
longDescription: A low-ankle safety shoe for general factory floor and warehouse use, built around a steel toe cap rated to 200 joules impact and a puncture-resistant midsole. The oil- and slip-resistant rubber outsole holds grip on wet or oily concrete, and the leather upper is breathable enough for full-shift wear.

images.alt: Steel-Toe Safety Shoes supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
